text: The medical advisory board shall advise the commissioner on medical criteria and vision standards for the licensing of drivers.
markdown:
# Vehicle & Traffic Law
## Title 5
#### Article 21
##### § 541 — Purpose

The medical advisory board shall advise the commissioner on medical criteria and vision standards for the licensing of drivers.

*Last modified: Sep. 22, 2014*

subsections.text: The medical advisory board shall advise the commissioner on medical criteria and vision standards for the licensing of drivers.
